hero_desc: Nine years building consumer-led innovation at scale, establishing R&D capabilities, and doing work that matters beyond the bottom line. Now bringing that to London.
p1: I'm a product and innovation leader who has spent the last nine years at P&G India building things that reach millions of people. From establishing the country's first connected consumer research lab in Goa, to launching products that address real gaps in women's health — I care deeply about the quality of what gets made and why.
p2: My work sits at the intersection of consumer insight and commercial delivery. I've led large-scale quantitative research, built competitive intelligence models, managed full product lifecycles, and coached teams across functions. The thread throughout: genuine curiosity about what people need, and the discipline to build it well.
p3: Beyond P&G, I give time to social impact work — from civic tech NGOs to education programmes at IIT-Bombay. I believe good business and good impact aren't opposites; they're the same thing, done with enough ambition.
p4: I'm now relocating to London and actively exploring senior Innovation, R&D, or Consumer Insights Director roles.

skills.tags: End-to-end innovation, Jobs-to-be-Done, Portfolio management, Fast-cycle development
Large-scale quant & qual, Behavioural science, Competitive intelligence, Kantar
P&L management, Go-to-market, Category growth, Stakeholder management
